svg.text: A taxonomy of AI coding environments, from IDE forks to terminal-native agents
control loop sits in terminal, not
· The agent-first / agentic IDE pattern was popularised by Cursor's standalone Agents Window in v3 (April 2026).
· ADE (Agentic Development Environment) is an emerging term for tools where the control loop sits in a terminal/TUI rather than an editor.
· Tools listed are not exhaustive; categorisation reflects design philosophy, not exclusivity — many products span multiple categories.
